name: Qingdao Huijintong Power Equipment Co.,Ltd.
summary: Qingdao Huijintong Power Equipment Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells various galvanized and painted steel structures primarily in China. The company offers lattice steel towers, UHV towers, steel tubular towers, microwave communication towers, steel poles, substation structures, electrified railway structures, wind power generation equipment, photovoltaic power generation equipment, etc. It also provides electric power tower parts, fasteners, and electric power line accessories; marine floating structures, and equipment and fittings for marine engineering; inspection and testing services for steel structures and metal materials; and ocean engineering and new material technology R&D, technology promotion and transfer, and technical consultation services. It serves State Grid, China Southern Grid, and power generation companies. The company also exports its products to Canada, Myanmar, Pakistan, Kyrgyzstan, Australia, Italy, Nigeria, Sri Lanka, Laos, France, Israel, Mongolia, and internationally. Qingdao Huijintong Power Equipment Co.,Ltd. is based in Qingdao, China.
